PR & Brand Communications — Portfolio
Acacia Dixon
Culture-Led PR & Influencer Strategy

A culturally-driven PR professional with hands-on experience activating brands across fashion, beauty, lifestyle and culture. Confident across campaign strategy, press relations, influencer gifting, event management and reporting — with experience spanning London Fashion Week and some of the UK's most exciting brand moments.

Barbour Creed ALO UGG Bumble Tommee Tippee Courvoisier Good Culture Agency
Since my placement
Final Year
BSc Marketing — Graduating July 2025

Returning to university after my placement year at Good Culture, I brought real-world industry experience into my final year of study — applying the confidence, strategic thinking and cultural awareness I developed on the job to everything I did academically and beyond.

End of Placement Presentation
"Women Leads Are
The Future of PR"

Presented to the Good Culture team at the end of my placement year, this piece explored how female-led, culture-driven agencies are reshaping the next generation of PR and marketing. Drawing directly on my placement experience, it argued that community-first, values-led leadership is not just the future of the industry — it is already the present.

Communications Module — Nivea
'Moments of Care' — Mother's Day Campaign

Developed a full Mother's Day communications campaign for Nivea, centred around transforming everyday skincare into a meaningful gifting experience. The 'Moments of Care' concept included a curated gift set, emotional storytelling strategy, digital personalisation feature and sustainable packaging design — targeting both premium and price-sensitive buyers. Awarded 70% across the combined presentation and essay.

Campaign strategy Consumer insight Brand communications 70% grade
BrumWIM — Women in Marketing
Personal Brand Seminar — Continued Industry Learning

Attended the BrumWIM Personal Brand Seminar featuring industry leader Jo Bird, exploring how to build an authentic personal brand in the marketing and communications space. Staying connected to the industry throughout my final year reinforced my belief that female-led networks and communities are shaping the future of the profession.

Women in marketing Personal branding Industry networking Continued learning
Available from
July 2025

Having completed my BSc Marketing placement year and final year studies, I am ready to bring everything I have learned — in the industry and in the classroom — into a full-time role in PR and brand communications.

Core competencies
01
Campaign Strategy & Execution

End-to-end delivery of high-profile brand campaigns — briefing to live activation — with consistent messaging across channels and markets.

02
Press & Media Relations

Built meaningful relationships with key press across fashion, lifestyle and culture, managing outreach pipelines and securing high-quality coverage.

03
Influencer Gifting & Talent

Identified and vetted talent aligned with brand values, managed bespoke gifting logistics and built authentic creator partnerships at scale.

04
Event Management

Planned and delivered brand activations and press events — guest lists, gifting suites, experiential moments and on-the-ground coordination.

05
Campaign Reporting

Compiled post-campaign reports measuring reach, sentiment and coverage quality — translating data into clear, actionable insights for brand teams.

06
Multi-Market Brand Buzz

Delivered culturally resonant storytelling across UK markets, connecting brand narratives with engaged, diverse audiences at the right moments.

Placement work — Good Culture Agency
Creed Fragrances
Eladaria Launch — Influencer Gifting

Managed personalised influencer gifting for the launch of Creed's newest fragrance, Eladaria — a trilogy of rose, vanilla and musk. Coordinated bespoke unboxing packages with handwritten notes to build creator excitement ahead of launch.

Barbour
SS25 Press Day & Gifting Activation

Supported Barbour's seasonal press day from managing clothing samples and gifting logistics to coordinating branded cocktail activations. Prepared influencer mailers and managed end-to-end creator seeding.

Barbour — Creator Seeding
"The Edit by Alexa" Mailer & Product Seeding

Coordinated outreach and physical despatch of Barbour's influencer collaboration mailer boxes. Managed product seeding of the new Barbour clog to key talent — handling sample prep, talent identification and end-to-end logistics from the press office.

UGG
Oxford Street Pop-Up — Brand Experience

Supported UGG's immersive Oxford Street activation featuring a Chin Chin Ice Cream collaboration and live DJ set. Managed influencer attendance and content capture to amplify the experiential moment across social channels.

Bumble
My Love Is Black Love — Cultural Campaign

Supported Bumble's community-first "My Love Is Black Love" campaign in partnership with Flipper's Roller Boogie Palace. Assisted with event execution, talent coordination and media coverage for a culturally resonant activation celebrating Black love.

Multi-Brand
Influencer Gifting Campaigns & Press Coverage

Project-managed coordinated influencer gifting campaigns — preparing, packaging and dispatching personalised gift boxes to talent across multiple brands. Maintained active press relationships, tracking coverage across key media titles including Vogue, GQ, Esquire and Viper.
